title: Linux Suspicious Download to /tmp
description: Detects file downloads to /tmp directory using common tools. Attackers frequently stage payloads in /tmp as it is world-writable.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ((('Process Name' = 'wget' or 'Process Name' = 'curl')) and ((msg like '*/tmp/*' or msg like '*-o /tmp*' or msg like '*-O /tmp*')))
falsepositives: Package managers downloading to temporary locations
